// What is it

Presence Without Visual Capture

A professional sensing module that transforms raw wireless telemetry into interpretable operational signals.

Signal-Driven Intelligence

HEIMDALL Sense WiFi continuously observes the surrounding wireless environment, detecting presence, movement intensity and adjacent-zone activity through RSSI fluctuation analysis — with zero dependency on cameras.

The system builds temporal windows over rolling buffers of raw signal samples, applies Kalman filtering and variance analysis, and infers state from correlated multi-BSSID patterns.

Designed as a specialized sensing component within the HEIMDALL ecosystem, it feeds telemetry, events and status outputs to higher-level orchestration layers like ARCHON.

RSSI Analysis Kalman Filter PyQt6 Python Through-Wall Multi-BSSID Webhooks
// Live RSSI Feed — Multi-BSSID ● PRESENCE DETECTED
// Pipeline

How the System Works

A disciplined signal processing pipeline from raw RF environment to operational state output.

01
📡
WiFi Scan
Continuous sampling of nearby wireless environments via standard adapter at 800ms intervals
02
📊
RSSI Capture
Raw signal level data captured per BSSID, stored in rolling temporal buffers of 150 samples
03
⚗️
Kalman Filter
1D adaptive Kalman with 3-sample median pre-filter. Adaptive R applied on signal jumps >5 dBm
04
🎯
Calibration
30-second baseline learning phase adapts thresholds to the local RF environment. Persists to disk
05
🧮
Variance Analysis
Multi-BSSID correlation evaluates temporal instability. Min 0.52 correlation for through-wall inference
06
⚡
State Output
Timeline events, alerts, webhooks, and UI telemetry dispatched to HEIMDALL ecosystem layers
// Core Capabilities

What the Module Does

Six specialized capabilities engineered for professional sensing environments.

👁️‍🗨️
Camera-Free Presence
Detects occupancy purely through wireless telemetry — no visual capture, no privacy concerns. The sensing layer is invisible by design.
📈
Continuous RSSI Analysis
Rolling buffers evaluate signal behavior over time instead of isolated snapshots, providing statistically robust presence inference.
🔬
Environmental Calibration
A dedicated 30-second baseline phase learns local RF conditions, applying realistic thresholds that reduce false positives significantly.
🌊
Motion Inference
Movement estimated through temporal instability patterns across observed BSSIDs. Distinguishes static presence from active motion.
🧱
Through-Wall Detection
Multi-BSSID signal correlation detects activity in adjacent or separated zones. Minimum 2 BSSIDs with 0.52+ correlation required.
🔗
Integration-Ready Output
Structured event outputs, webhook-compatible bridge, and embeddable UI panel. Plug into ARCHON, HEIMDALL, or any automation workflow.
// Inference States

Detection Modes

Four operational states inferred from signal variance analysis, each with calibrated threshold values.

STATE 00
EMPTY
No significant RSSI variance detected. Baseline signal patterns confirm unoccupied space. Buffer stable within noise floor.
VARIANCE < PRESENCE_THRESHOLD
STATE 01
PRESENCE
RSSI fluctuations consistent with static human occupancy detected. Sustained variance above calibrated threshold over evaluation window.
THR: 0.025 (calibrated)
STATE 02
MOTION
Elevated temporal instability patterns across BSSIDs. Signal changes consistent with active movement in the monitored zone.
THR: 0.010 motion (calibrated)
STATE 03
THROUGH-WALL
Multi-BSSID correlation signatures suggest activity in an adjacent or separated zone. Requires minimum 2 correlated wireless sources.
MIN CORRELATION: 0.52+
// Technical Profile

System Specifications

Full technical parameters extracted from the sensing engine.

LanguagePython 3.x
Interface LayerPyQt6
Signal ModelRSSI-based temporal analysis
Scan Interval800 ms (netsh wlan)
Rolling Buffer150 samples (~2 min)
Evaluation Window12 samples (~12 sec)
Motion Threshold (raw)0.07 variance
Presence Threshold (raw)0.12 variance
Presence Threshold (cal.)0.025
Motion Threshold (cal.)0.010
Kalman Filter1D adaptive, 3-sample median pre-filter
Adaptive R TriggerSignal jump >5 dBm
Calibration Duration30 seconds — persists to JSON
Through-Wall Min BSSIDs2 correlated sources
Correlation Minimum0.52
PlatformWindows — standard WiFi adapter
Data PersistenceSQLite + JSON local storage
Output OptionsUI telemetry, events, webhook bridge
// Applications

Potential Use Cases

Designed for professional, research, and defensive environments where visual sensing is not an option.

🏢
Smart-Space Awareness
Non-intrusive occupancy monitoring for offices, labs, or controlled facilities without camera infrastructure.
🔒
Security Telemetry
Local telemetry enrichment for security environments — adds RF-layer context to physical access monitoring.
🔭
RF Research & Prototyping
Lab experimentation with WiFi motion inference and RSSI-based sensing in controlled environments.
🤖
Automation Integration
Feeds presence signals to home or professional automation platforms through structured webhook outputs.
👤
Occupancy Estimation
Non-visual estimation of space occupancy where privacy regulations prohibit camera-based systems.
🔗
HEIMDALL Ecosystem
Native integration with ARCHON orchestrator, HEIMDALL facial recognition, and the full OkrtSystem Labs stack.

// Design Philosophy

Built with Discipline

HEIMDALL Sense WiFi is not a consumer gadget. It is a professional sensing module designed with operational rigor.

🎯

Signal-Driven Inference

Every detection decision is grounded in measurable RSSI data, calibrated thresholds, and statistical correlation — not heuristic guesswork.

🔭

Operator Visibility

The interface exposes full telemetry: status, signal graphs, event timelines, and operational indicators aligned with HEIMDALL's visual language.

🧩

Modular Integration

Designed as a specialized sensing node, not a monolithic product. It feeds structured outputs to whatever layer needs the signal intelligence.

⚙️

Calibration-Aware Detection

Static thresholds fail in real environments. The system learns the baseline RF behavior of each deployment location before operating.

🛡️

Controlled Deployment

Intended for authorized environments with appropriate governance. Not a surveillance product — a professional telemetry module.

🌑

OkrtSystem Labs Aesthetic

Dark tactical interface, high-contrast telemetry cues, disciplined separation between sensing, visualization, and orchestration layers.
